zh.Rushall, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾盧沙拉爾
zh.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale是William de Rushall的兒子，於1181年出生在英國斯塔福爾盧沙拉爾。他至少有1個女兒。他去世於1231年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.Rushall, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾盧沙拉爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale是William de Rushall的儿子，于1181年出生在英国斯塔福爾盧沙拉爾。他至少有1个女儿。他去世于1231年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale was born in 1181, in Rushall, Staffordshire, England as the son of William de Rushall. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1231, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale est né en 1181, à Rushall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fils de William de Rushall. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1231, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale wurde 1181 in Rushall, Staffordshire, England, als Sohn von William de Rushall geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1231 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale è nato il nel 1181 nel Rushall, Staffordshire, England come figlio di William de Rushall. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1231, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Rushall, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアルシャル
ja.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushaleは1181年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアルシャルでWilliam de Rushallの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1231年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale(은)는 1181년 영국 스태퍼드실르 러샤에서 William de Rushall의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1231년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale nasceu em 1181, em Rushall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra filho de William de Rushall. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1231, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale родился в 1181 г. в местности рушолл, стаффордшир, Англия. Его отца звали William de Rushall. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1231 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William Richard de Rushale nació en 1181, en Rushall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de William de Rushall. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1231, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.

th.Rushall, Staffordshire, England: รัแชลล์, สตาฟอรดชิเร, เอิงแลนด์
